title: NeugebauerLab/Creinhardtii_heatStress
author: Shine, Morgan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains code to preprocess and analyze short-read (Illumina) and long-read (PacBio) sequencing data for polyadenylated RNA from the green alga  Chlamydomonas reinhardtii .
steps_raw: This repository contains code to preprocess and analyze short-read (Illumina) and long-read (PacBio) sequencing data for polyadenylated RNA from the green alga  Chlamydomonas reinhardtii .
